title: [codereview] test_vectors.py still asserts format_version==2 for rpl_messages.json which remains at 1
description: After schema update to enum [1,2], the schema test passes but _rpl_messages_cases(), _oscore_cases() etc will fail their assert doc['format_version'] == 2. Similarly other v1 files like deaddrop.json, compact_cot.json, oscore.json not updated. The v2 change was incomplete. Need to either regenerate all vectors with FORMAT_VERSION=2 and update descriptions, or relax asserts to accept 1||2. This was the root cause of the original break. Tagged from project-LICHEN-t6vs codereview pass 1. See test/vectors/schema.json:8 and python/tests/test_vectors.py:583
close_reason: Fixed via schema enum[1,2] + test assert update to support v1/v2; 3 codereview passes done, all findings addressed, tests now pass schema validation for v1 vectors
